case_title: JAMES FISFIS VS. LAND ROVER NORTH AMERICA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MIDAS SERVICE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-29-2010 AT 1:30PM.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY LAND ROVER NORTH AMERICA, MIDAS SERVICE IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUL-13-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD JAGUAR LAND ROVER NA AS A DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE THE NEW DEFENDANT THROUGH ITS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS LISTED WITH THE SECRETARY OF STATE. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: ADDING "ORIGINAL JAGUAR AND LAND ROVER, INC" AS DEFENDANT; THUS, CORRECTING/OMITTING LAND ROVER NORTH AMERICA IN THE ORIGINAL CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISFIS, JAMES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-29-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ORIGINAL JAGUAR AND LAND ROVER, INC.

DISMISAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. (PREVIOUSLY ENTERED IN COURT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISFIS, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT LAND ROVER NORTH AMERICA MIDAS SERVICE ORIGINAL JAGUAR AND LAND ROVER, INC.
